name: Understand-Anything
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Lum1104 /

      Understand-Anything  

    
      Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.
summary: 该项目能将任何代码转化为可交互的知识图谱，便于探索、搜索和提问，支持多种AI工具如Claude Code和Copilot等。

name: rohitg00
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        rohitg00 /

      ai-engineering-from-scratch  

    
      Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
summary: 该项目是一个关于AI工程从零开始的学习资源库，旨在帮助开发者学习、构建并发布AI项目，值得关注因其提供实践性强的AI开发指南。

name: mukul975
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        mukul975 /

      Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills  

    
      754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND & NIST AI RMF · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 26 security domains · Apache 2.0
summary: 该项目整理了754种结构化网络安全技能，适用于AI代理，并映射到5大安全框架，支持多种开发平台和工具，值得关注因其为AI安全领域提供了全面的技能标准和实用资源。

name: codegraph
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        colbymchenry /

      codegraph  

    
      Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local
summary: codegraph 是一个为代码生成工具提供预索引知识图谱的项目，能显著减少token消耗和工具调用次数，完全本地运行。值得关注因为它能提升代码生成效率并保护隐私。

name: airi
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        moeru-ai /

      airi  

    
      💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.
summary: moeru-ai/airi 是一个自托管的虚拟伴侣项目，支持实时语音聊天和游戏互动，旨在创造类似 Neuro-sama 的虚拟存在，值得关注因其创新的跨平台支持和沉浸式交互体验。

name: claude-cookbooks
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        anthropics /

      claude-cookbooks  

    
      A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.
summary: 该项目是Anthropic公司整理的Claude AI使用示例合集，通过Jupyter Notebook展示多种有趣且高效的Claude应用场景，值得关注因为它能帮助开发者快速掌握Claude的实用技巧。

name: knowledge-work-plugins
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        anthropics /

      knowledge-work-plugins  

    
      Open source repository of plugins primarily intended for knowledge workers to use in Claude Cowork
summary: 该项目是专为知识工作者设计的Claude Cowork插件合集，值得关注因其开源特性及提升工作效率的实用工具。

name: affaan-m
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        affaan-m /

      ECC  

    
      The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 该项目是一个针对AI代码助手（如Claude Code、Codex等）的性能优化系统，专注于提升技能、记忆、安全性和研发效率，值得关注因其创新性地优化了AI编码工具的核心能力。
